name: Silicone Cookware Kitchen Utensils Set °C °C Heat Resistant Silicone Kitchen Utensils Set Spatula, Shovel, Spoon, Egg Beater, Kitchen Gadgets For Non-Stick Cookware, BPA Free (Gray)
features: Heat-resistant and durable: The Oannao Silicone Kitchenware Set features upgraded thickened silicone for enhanced durability and resilience for a smoother cooking experience. Withstands 446°F (230°C) up to 230°C without melting or deformation, even with frequent use. Soft and thick pot head prevents scratches on kitchen utensils and is suitable for non-stick pots and daily high-temperature cooking

Food Grade BPA Free: This silicone cutlery set is made of high quality food grade silicone, free of BPA, odor free and non-responsive to food. Effective resistance to stains and odors: Oannao cutlery stays fresh and clean even when highly flavored ingredients such as garlic, onions, spices or tomatoes are reused - no residual odors or color residues affect future use

Versatile tools: This silicone scraper set includes essential tools: scraper, spoon, spatula, slotted spoon, spatula, etc. Designed to handle everyday cooking and baking tasks - stirring sauces, soups, flipping pancakes, mixing batter - making it a reliable helper for home cooks and beginners, a must-have tool for a new home or apartment

Cutlery is a must-have in the kitchen: This silicone kitchen set is stylish and practical, perfect for modern and classic kitchen styles. Suitable for everyday use or as a thoughtful gift (wedding, relocation celebration, birthday) to add convenience and efficiency to daily cooking.
